description:
An open-source alternative to Claude Cowork, powered by OpenCode

OpenWork is an extensible, open-source “Claude Work” style system for knowledge workers.
It’s a native desktop app that runs OpenCode under the hood, but presents it as a clean, guided workflow:
- pick a workspace
- start a run
- watch progress + plan updates
- approve permissions when needed
- reuse what works (templates + skills)
The goal: make “agentic work” feel like a product, not a terminal.
Highlights
- Improve the session composer with React parity work, multiline draft syncing after send, and restored transcript autoscroll growth detection.
- Add French localization support and continue documentation translation cleanup for broader onboarding coverage.
Fixes & polish
- Refresh the landing and enterprise pages with cleaner pricing, real product previews, and a revert that restores free Windows downloads/builds.
- Improve cloud settings readability in dark mode and split tsup builds to avoid declaration race conditions.
Packaging / ops
- Bump the desktop, server, orchestrator, and router packages to 0.11.207 and refresh lockfiles.
- Update AUR packaging and release workflow metadata for the new version.
Compare:
https://github.com/different-ai/openwork/compare/v0.11.206...v0.11.207
